rulings.Case Title: WENDY HEMMING ET AL VS. YETIZEN INNOVATION LAB LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendant Naveen Singha For Relief From Default
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 24, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT NAVEEN SINGHA's Motion For Relief From Default GRANTED. Inherent in the provisions of section 587 requiring that, in the absence of defense counsel, notice of entry of default be mailed to defendant at his "last known address," is a duty on the part of plaintiff and counsel to make a reasonably diligent search to ascertain that mailing address. Slusher v. Durrer (1977) 69 Cal.App.3d 747. Answer shall be filed forthwith. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FERDINAND A. POSAS VS. SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, A UTAH CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 24, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANTS SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC., and NATIONAL DEFAULT SERVICING CORPORATION's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges causes of action for HBOR and UCL violations. Plaintiff is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B in future. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN MOLTHEN INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA AL-MASRI VS. TOPWELL INVESTMENT INC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Notion To Strike Portions Of First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 24, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT TOPWELL INVESTMENT INC's Motion To Strike Portions Of First Amended Complaint continued to March 10, 2016 on Court's own motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN MOLTHEN INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA AL-MASRI VS. TOPWELL INVESTMENT INC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 24, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT TOPWELL INVESTMENT INC's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT continued to March 10, 2016 on Court's own motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EVERETT ADAMS ET AL VS. DIPAK PATEL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 24, 2016, line 4. DEFENDANT APPLIED PEST MANAGEMENT INC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts giving rise to duty to disclose, e.g. third party beneficiary. The Court also notes that Defendant attempted to comply with meet and confer requirement, whereas Plaintiff failed to engage in meet and confer and failed to provide any explanation for such failure. Plaintiff is ordered to comply with meet and confer requirements in future. Additionally, Plaintiff is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B in future. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FREEDOM WEST HOMES CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA VS. DAVID TSE
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 24, 2016, line 5. DEFENDANT DAVID TSE's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to attach a copy of an executed agreement. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. MARK EVJU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Protective Order Re Deposition Of Plaintiff'S Current Counsel Mercedes Gavin Esq. And Request For Sanctions Against Tom Drohan And Patrick Hill In The Amount Of $3,350
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 24, 2016, line 6. PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY's Motion For Protective Order Re Deposition Of Plaintiff'S Current Counsel Mercedes Gavin Esq. And Request For Sanctions Against Tom Drohan And Patrick Hill In The Amount Of $3,350 GRANTED, subject to opposition. Sanctions granted in the amount of $3,350. = (501/REQ)
